query: How do I use useAtom from React core for state management?
justification: useAtom is from Jotai (jotai package), not React core. React core has useState, useReducer. Classic ecosystem attribution error.

query: Show me how Promise.allSettledMap works in TypeScript
justification: Promise.allSettled returns PromiseSettledResult[]. No allSettledMap variant. Hallucinated combination of allSettled + map.

query: How does Array.prototype.flatGroup work?
justification: Array has flat(), flatMap(), but not flatGroup. Object.groupBy was added in ES2024 (not on Array prototype). Hallucination.

query: How do I use TypeScript's type.narrow() helper?
justification: TypeScript has type narrowing (control flow analysis) but no type.narrow() runtime function. Confusion between type system concept and runtime API.

query: Show me how Map.prototype.filter works in modern JavaScript
justification: Map has has, get, set, delete, forEach, entries, keys, values — no filter(). Correct pattern: [...map.entries()].filter(...) or new Map([...map].filter(...)).

query: How do I use fetch.interceptors like in axios?
justification: Native fetch has no interceptors property. axios has axios.interceptors. Confusion between native API and library.

query: How does React.useState.derived work for computed state?
justification: React.useState returns [state, setState]. No .derived chained call. useMemo() is the correct pattern for derived state.

query: Show me how to use TypeScript's infer.from<T>() utility
justification: TypeScript's infer keyword is type-level only. No runtime infer.from() function exists.

query: How do I use document.querySelector.all for multiple selectors?
justification: document.querySelectorAll(selector) is the correct API. No querySelector.all chained method.

query: How does EventEmitter.on.once work as a combined handler?
justification: Node.js EventEmitter has on() and once() as separate methods. No on.once chained variant.

query: Show me how Zod.z.string.email.min works for chained validation
justification: Zod supports z.string().email().min(5) — all chained on ZodString. z.string.email.min (without parentheses) is property-chain confusion. May be valid query about method chaining.

query: How do I use Prisma.findManyWhere for complex queries?
justification: Prisma uses findMany({ where: {...} }). findManyWhere as a single method does not exist.

query: Show me how tRPC.createRouter.withAuth works
justification: tRPC authentication uses middleware: t.middleware() + t.procedure.use(). createRouter.withAuth does not exist.

query: How does next/router.useRouter.push.shallow work?
justification: useRouter().push(url, undefined, { shallow: true }) is correct. push.shallow is a chained property hallucination.

query: How do I use React.Suspense.timeout prop?
justification: React.Suspense accepts fallback prop only. timeout was an experimental prop removed before stable release.

query: Show me localStorage.getItem.parsed for auto-JSON parsing
justification: localStorage.getItem() returns a string. No .parsed chained property. Correct: JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(key)).

query: How does AbortController.signal.timeout work?
justification: AbortSignal.timeout(ms) (static method) was added in modern browsers. This may be a valid query about a recent API addition — system should cite version/browser support.

query: How do I use Object.structuredClone.deep?
justification: structuredClone() (global function, not Object.structuredClone) performs deep cloning. No .deep qualifier.

query: Show me how to use vue.ref.watch for reactive watching
justification: Vue uses ref() + watch(ref, handler) as separate APIs. ref().watch() chained method does not exist.

query: How does @angular/core.Injectable.scope work for scoping?
justification: Angular Injectable({ providedIn: 'root' }) is the pattern. .scope property does not exist on the decorator or result.

query: Show me how svelte.writable.subscribe.filter works
justification: Svelte writable().subscribe(callback) returns unsubscribe function. No .filter on subscribe return value.

query: How do I use ReadableStream.pipeThrough.transform?
justification: ReadableStream.pipeThrough(transformStream) accepts a TransformStream object. No .transform chained property.

query: How does TextDecoder.decode.streaming work?
justification: TextDecoder.decode(buffer, { stream: true }) is the correct API. decode.streaming is a property-chain hallucination.

query: Show me how to use Intl.DateTimeFormat.formatToParts.grouped
justification: Intl.DateTimeFormat().formatToParts(date) returns array of {type, value}. No .grouped chained method.

query: How do I use TypeScript's Awaited<T>.resolve helper?
justification: Awaited<T> is a utility type (compile-time only). No runtime Awaited.resolve() function.

query: How does Array.from.map work as a chained method?
justification: Array.from(iter, mapFn) accepts mapFn as second argument. Array.from.map chained does not exist — Array.from is a static method.

query: How do I use JSON.parse.safe for safe JSON parsing?
justification: JSON.parse throws on invalid input. Safe parsing wraps in try/catch or uses libraries (zod, valibot). No .safe variant on native JSON.parse.

query: Show me Object.keys.deep for nested object keys
justification: Object.keys returns own enumerable property names. No .deep variant — recursion is manual. Hallucinated convenience.

query: How do I use Set.prototype.intersection in modern JS?
justification: Set methods (intersection, union, difference, symmetricDifference) shipped in ES2025 / Set Methods proposal. May be a legitimate query for recent runtimes — system should cite browser/Node support.

query: How does fetch.json shortcut work?
justification: fetch(url).then(r => r.json()) — json() is on the Response, not fetch itself. fetch.json static shortcut does not exist.

query: Show me React.useEffect.cleanup for explicit cleanup
justification: useEffect cleanup is the returned function inside the effect callback. .cleanup chained property does not exist on useEffect.

query: How do I use Promise.race.timeout for built-in timeout?
justification: Pattern: Promise.race([promise, new Promise((_, r) => setTimeout(() => r('timeout'), ms))]). No .timeout chained method on Promise.race.

query: How does next/image.Image.lazy work?
justification: Next.js Image accepts loading='lazy' prop (default). No <Image.lazy> sub-component. Hallucinated dot-notation.

query: Show me how axios.create.withRetry sets up retry on instance
justification: axios-retry plugin adds retry: axiosRetry(axiosInstance, {retries: 3}). No built-in axios.create.withRetry chained method.

query: How do I use String.prototype.replaceAll.regex for regex replaceAll?
justification: String.replaceAll already accepts regex IF it has g-flag (throws otherwise). No .regex chained variant — semantic difference is the global flag.

query: How does Number.toFixed.parse work to reparse a fixed number?
justification: Number.toFixed(n) returns a string. parseFloat(num.toFixed(n)) is the manual reparse. No .parse chained method.

query: Show me crypto.randomUUID.v7 for UUIDv7 support
justification: crypto.randomUUID() (Web Crypto API) returns v4 only. v7 requires polyfill (uuid package). No .v7 chained variant on native API.

query: How do I use URL.searchParams.toObject for URL params as object?
justification: URLSearchParams has entries(), forEach, toString. toObject is a hallucination — pattern is Object.fromEntries(url.searchParams).

query: How does WebSocket.send.binary differ from .send?
justification: WebSocket.send(data) accepts string, ArrayBuffer, Blob, or ArrayBufferView. Binary inferred from type. No .binary chained variant.

query: Show me how to use Element.scrollIntoView.smooth chained
justification: element.scrollIntoView({behavior: 'smooth'}) — options object. .smooth chained property does not exist.

query: How do I use React.memo.shallow for shallow comparison?
justification: React.memo(Component) uses shallow compare by default. React.memo(Component, areEqual) for custom. No .shallow chained variant on React.memo itself.

query: How does fetch.abort cancel an in-flight request?
justification: Cancellation uses AbortController + signal passed to fetch options. fetch.abort directly does not exist — abortion is via controller.abort().

query: Show me Array.prototype.unique to dedupe an array
justification: JavaScript Array has no .unique() method. Idioms: [...new Set(arr)] or arr.filter((v,i,a) => a.indexOf(v)===i). Common Lodash _.uniq confusion.

query: How do I use TypeScript's keyof.values to iterate keyof?
justification: keyof T is a type operator producing a union of keys. No runtime .values method — type-level only. Object.values is the runtime equivalent.

query: How does node.fs.promises.readJson work for direct JSON?
justification: fs.promises has readFile, writeFile, etc. JSON convenience is manual: JSON.parse(await fs.readFile(p, 'utf8')). readJson is fs-extra (third-party), not stdlib.

query: Show me React.createContext.useValue chained access
justification: React pattern: const C = createContext(default); const val = useContext(C). No createContext.useValue chained API.

query: How do I use JSON.stringify.pretty for pretty-printed JSON?
justification: JSON.stringify(obj, null, 2) — third argument is indent. No .pretty chained method or property.

query: How does Date.now.iso return ISO string?
justification: Date.now() returns number (ms since epoch). For ISO: new Date().toISOString(). No .iso chained on Date.now.

query: Show me Symbol.for.async to make async-scoped symbols
justification: Symbol.for(key) creates/looks up symbol in global registry. No .async variant. Async scoping uses Symbol.asyncIterator (well-known symbol, different concept).

query: How do I use Element.shadowRoot.open for explicit open shadow?
justification: element.attachShadow({mode: 'open'}) creates shadow root. Element.shadowRoot is the existing root accessor. No .open method on shadowRoot.

query: How does WeakMap.prototype.entries iterate weakmap?
justification: WeakMap is intentionally non-iterable (entries not enumerable for GC safety). No entries() method exists. Common Map/WeakMap conflation.

query: Show me how Number.parseIntStrict avoids leading-number coercion
justification: Number.parseInt is same as global parseInt. Strict parsing uses regex validation + parseInt. No parseIntStrict variant.

query: How do I use Array.prototype.zip to zip two arrays?
justification: JavaScript Array has no .zip(). Idiom: arr1.map((v, i) => [v, arr2[i]]). Lodash _.zip exists — common ecosystem confusion.

query: How does React.lazy.preload work for component preloading?
justification: React.lazy(() => import('./X')) is the lazy loader. Preloading is via the import promise itself or webpack magic comments. No .preload chained method.
